projects.title: Primary school building repair and girls' toilet block — Banganga Ward
projects.demand_evidence: 11 citizen complaints (9 unique citizens), equity-boosted 1.6x for a 68% literacy ward where fewer residents file complaints.
projects.severity_evidence: UDISE+ 2024-25: 22% dropout rate, 1 school per 8,400 children vs district avg 1 per 3,100.
projects.feasibility_evidence: Est. ₹18L, 3-month timeline; existing government building and land, MPLAD head applicable.

projects.title: LED streetlight installation and dark-spot elimination — Banganga
projects.demand_evidence: 8 complaints (6 citizens) on streetlights, equity-boosted 1.6x; the linked night-safety cluster adds corroborating demand.
projects.severity_evidence: Ward streetlight density mapped 'low'; night-safety theft cluster corroborates the dark-spot risk.
projects.feasibility_evidence: Est. ₹9L for 140 LED fixtures on existing poles; 6-week timeline under IMC smart-lighting rate contract.

projects.title: Sewer desilting and drain reconstruction — Musakhedi main nala
projects.demand_evidence: 7 complaints (6 citizens), equity-boosted 1.65x for a 66% literacy ward.
projects.severity_evidence: Stagnant water overlaps ward dengue reports; PHC density 0.3 per 10k vs 0.9 in planned wards.
projects.feasibility_evidence: Est. ₹42L; desilting immediate (3 weeks) but reconstruction needs AMRUT 2.0 sanction (files pending at UADD).

projects.title: Road resurfacing and pothole repair — Scheme 54 corridor, Vijay Nagar
projects.demand_evidence: 6 complaints (5 citizens); no equity boost — 91% literacy ward already over-represented in complaint volume.
projects.severity_evidence: Recurring potholes on a busy corridor; no injury reports on record, kept moderate.
projects.feasibility_evidence: Est. ₹95L for 2.4 km; IMC road-maintenance head available; monsoon limits work to patch-first (5-month timeline).

projects.title: Health sub-centre upgrade with daily OPD — Musakhedi
projects.demand_evidence: 4 complaints (4 citizens), equity-boosted 1.65x; under-reported relative to the documented health-access gap.
projects.severity_evidence: Ward phc_per_10k at 0.3 vs 0.9 in planned wards; overlaps the sanitation-driven dengue cluster.
projects.feasibility_evidence: Est. ₹1.6Cr; needs NHM staffing sanction plus building expansion on a disputed plot; 18-24 month timeline.

projects.title: Narmada pipeline replacement — AB Road / Geeta Bhawan, Palasia
projects.demand_evidence: 5 complaints (4 citizens); no equity boost — 89% literacy ward.
projects.severity_evidence: Intermittent supply but tanker backup available; pipeline age flagged in IMC records.
projects.feasibility_evidence: Est. ₹68L for 800m; requires road-cutting permission and night work on arterial AB Road (4-month timeline).

projects.title: New vocational training centre — Banganga Ward
projects.demand_evidence: Aspirational demand from 3 citizens; not the active dropout driver in complaint data.
projects.severity_evidence: Skilling gap is real but downstream of the primary-school infrastructure gap driving dropouts now.
projects.feasibility_evidence: Est. ₹1.2Cr; land acquisition and new construction (12-18 months); no trainer staffing sanction yet.
